emails.subject: congratulations!
emails.body: congratulations! Vince- Nice job, Dr. Managing Director Hey, is "Constrained Technical" anything like "constrained optimization"? Clayton

emails.subject: Re: congratulations!
emails.body: Re: congratulations! Clayton, Thanks. Constrained is a term that means "from a tight labor pool." Vince Clayton Vernon@ENRON 01/11/2000 08:41 AM
